---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for EnvGuard.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g., I'm always frustrated when...

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Security & Privacy Implications (Mandatory)
Because EnvGuard is a local developer secrets manager, security is our primary priority. 
Please describe how this feature impacts:
1. Secret containment (e.g. are secrets written to disk, memory, logs, or external hosts?)
2. Cryptographic attack surface (e.g. does this introduce new algorithms or key exchanges?)
3. Local environment privilege boundaries (e.g. does it run with elevated permissions or hook processes?)
4. Third-party integrations or dependency trust.
